name: rust-skills
description: Rust development assistant with routing skills, hooks, background agents, meta-cognition workflows, and 265 idiomatic Rust rules for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Layered Rust reasoning, docs lookup, code review, and rule checks.
interface.longDescription: Rust Skills helps Codex route Rust questions through ownership, borrowing, async, error handling, unsafe, ecosystem, domain-specific reasoning, and detailed idiomatic Rust rule checks. It includes UserPromptSubmit hooks for Rust-only meta-cognition, background agent manifests, and docs/crate research workflows.
defaultPrompt: Fix this Rust borrow checker error.
Review this Rust code for idiomatic best practices.
